title: Fix picker modal truncation by scrolling options on overflow
description:
## Summary
- Clamp the picker modal's option list to the modal's inner height and derive a scroll offset from the highlighted index so the focused row stays visible.
- Add a `## UI gotchas` section to `AGENTS.md` documenting the scroll-on-overflow pattern to prevent recurrence.

## Why
The picker modal pushed all visible options into a `Paragraph`, which silently truncates when content exceeds the available area — the highlighted row could scroll off-screen with no visual indication. This same bug had recurred three times across different panes (Changes, Form, picker modal), so the fix also documents the pattern in `AGENTS.md` to guide future development.

## Verification
- Not run (not provided)
